name: Apple Cider Bread or Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup apples, peeled, cored and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour 2 loaf pans or 18 muffin cups.
3. Cream the butter and 1 1/4 cups of sugar together in a large bowl until smooth.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon) together and add them to the egg mixture in three additions, alternating with milk.
6. Stir in the chopped apples.
7. Divide the batter evenly between the prepared loaf pans or muffin cups.
8. Sprinkle the remaining 1/4 cup of sugar mixed with cinnamon over the batter.
9. Bake bread for 50-70 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, and bake muffins for 30-40 minutes or until clean.
10. Yields 2 loaves or 18 muffins.
